headline.vsl_adaptation: Most wrinkle creams promise the world and deliver nothing. But this pharmacist-developed formula actually works - clinical testing proved it smooths facial lines in just one week...

lead.opening_verbatim: Breakthrough advancements for the improvement of aging skin have been made by compounding pharmacist R.C. Heldfond. eb5 Facial Cream, with its remarkable 'Synergex Delivery System' rescues aging skin by delivering the most advanced ingredients for dramatic results.
lead.transition_to_body: Fine lines around the mouth (featherlips), eye area, cheeks and forehead become almost unnoticeable.

mechanism.mechanism_description: A proprietary 'Synergex Delivery System' developed by compounding pharmacist R.C. Heldfond that delivers advanced anti-aging ingredients deeper into skin for more effective wrinkle smoothing in just one week.

proof_elements.verbatim: A prestigious clinical laboratory tested eb5 and concluded that 'after approximately one week of twice-a-day use, Heldfond Formula (eb5) was shown to be effective in smoothing facial skin lines.'
Both eb5 discoveries are sold in JCPenney Cosmetics & Fragrances departments

key_sections.content_verbatim: A prestigious clinical laboratory tested eb5 and concluded that 'after approximately one week of twice-a-day use, Heldfond Formula (eb5) was shown to be effective in smoothing facial skin lines.'
eb5 Eyetreatment was developed to improve the appearance of dark circles and puffiness around the eyes. It also firms and moisturizes the eye contour.
